---
title: "Leverage Effect: WSE vs NYSE"
---

# Leverage Effect: WSE vs NYSE

## Overview

This project investigates the leverage effect in equity markets through a comparison of the Warsaw Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange.

## Motivation and source

The analysis is inspired by an academic article on volatility asymmetry and leverage effects in financial markets.

- **Reference article:** add full citation here
- **Project goal:** state whether you replicate, adapt, or extend the original analysis

## Data

- **Polish market data:** add source
- **U.S. market data:** add source
- **Frequency:** daily
- **Sample period:** add dates

### Preprocessing

- return calculation
- alignment of time series
- handling of missing observations

## Methodology

- descriptive analysis of returns and volatility
- model specification for asymmetry
- comparative interpretation across markets

## Results

Add your plots and short interpretations here.

### Example figure

![](projects/leverage-effect/plots/plot1.png)

Brief interpretation of the figure.

## Poster

[Project poster (PDF)](/financial_mathematics/leverage-effect/poster.pdf)

## Code

[View project folder on GitHub](https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME/YOUR-REPO/tree/main/projects/leverage-effect)

## Back

[Return to homepage](index.html)
